title: Vision
summary: Product vision for lacon: a Rust CLI that filters and rewrites bash output via coding-assistant hooks to reduce token spend.
notes: Vision/scope doc with classic PRD signals (problem, approach, target users, success metrics, explicit non-goals, architectural commitments). Lacks user stories and acceptance criteria but defines product requirements at the strategic level, so PRD edges out DOC. No frontmatter, no decision sections, no API specs.
